rules.rule_text:
title: Successful Account Login Via WMI
id: 5af54681-df95-4c26-854f-2565e13cfab0
status: stable
description: Detects successful logon attempts performed with WMI
references:
- Internal Research
author: Thomas Patzke
date: 2019-12-04
modified: 2024-01-17
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1047
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: security
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 4624
    ProcessName|endswith: \WmiPrvSE.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Monitoring tools
- Legitimate system administration
level: low
